name: ocel-ocp
postCreateCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y git && git config --global --add safe.directory /workspace/ocel-ocp && pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel && pip install pytorch-frame torch-geometric pyg-lib torch-scatter torch-sparse torch-cluster -f https://data.pyg.org/whl/torch-2.9.1+cu128.html relbench optuna optuna-integration scikit-learn pandas scipy matplotlib seaborn plotly tqdm networkx transformers sentence-transformers lightning datasets xgboost lightgbm catboost ipython ipykernel duckdb pyarrow clearml unique-names-generator ijson pysimdjson sqlalchemy graphviz && pip freeze > requirements.txt
